Our University Welcomed Delegate from Azerbaijan State University of Economics

23.09.2022

Our university hosted the representative from Azerbaijan State University of Economics in the main campus.

Head of the Office for the Organization and Execution of Scientific Cooperations of the Azerbaijan State University of Economics Prof. Zahid Farrukh Mammadov visited our university. Prof. Mammadov made this courtesy visit on behalf of the Azerbaijan State University of Economics’ Rector Prof. Adalet Muradov. Prof. Mammadov, and first met with our university’s President, Prof. Atilla Arkan.

The delegate then met with our university’s Dean of the School of Business, Prof. Mustafa Kemal Yılmaz, Assist. Prof. Nihat Gümüş, Haydar Aliyev Eurasian Studies Application and Research Center Prof. Yaşar Sarı and Dr. Najiba Mustafayeva, and Director of International Office Mr. Enes Yalman, and had talks on the possible cooperation between the two universities.
